name: Open Sesame-Ginger Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the mustard, ginger and soy sauce in a bowl.
2. Blend in the sesame oil, sesame seeds, pepper and green onion until well combined.
3. Fold in the sour cream until incorporated.
4. Cover and chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
5. Serve with chicken strips or cubes, fried wontons, noodle chips, or bok choy.
